title: Children's Clothing * Foster Children - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Children's Clothing * Foster Children 9 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Foster Children Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details BEAUTIFUL SAVIOR LUTHERAN CHURCH CLOTHING BOUTIQUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers recycled clothing for people of all ages, including items suitable for work, interviews, and school. Appointments are limited to one per month. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 9am-noon. Additional hours available for those fostering a child. Email (503) 788-7000 Visit Website More Details ELYSIUM SANCTUARY FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, shoes, school supplies, and birthday party supplies for foster families, and shares information about community events and activities through published or online calendars Confidential Mailing Address Eligibility: Resource (Foster) families Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH OF PRINEVILLE HOPE'S CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers clothing, linen, shoes, and grooming supplies. 450 SE Fairview Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Foster and adoptive children 0-18 years old Hours: 1st, 2nd, 3th and 5th Thursdays of the month 9am-11am; 4th Thursday 12:30pm-2:30pm Email (541) 848-0138 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROJECT 48 Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tailored bags with essential items for foster children entering care, including clothing, hair care products, and LGBTQ2S+ sensitive options. Offers a six-week program for youth aging out of foster care, featuring workshops on financial literacy, resume building, and interview preparation. 2505 SE 11th Avenue Suite 122 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Foster youth ages 7-23 Hours: Varies Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROJECT LEMONADE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Youth in foster care can get new or nearly new outfits, accessories, and shoes, which they get to choose themselves. 1008 Lloyd Center Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 5-20 in the ODHS Child Welfare system with an open case Hours: Tuesday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-1pm Email (503) 395-3976 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SWEET POTATO'S CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential resources and support to individuals and families, with a special focus on resource families and at-risk youth. Provides clothing, diapers, wipes, toiletries, hygiene items, and other resources. 167 E Main Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Resource families may access resources as needed. Other clients must be engaged with and accompanied by a community partner. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3pm, Friday 1pm-7pm Email (541) 371-2224 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE CONTINGENT MY NEIGHBOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects goods and services from community members to families and youth impacted by foster care. 809 N Russell Street #203 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: -Resource families and foster children/youth -Biological families and relative providers with an open ODHS Child Welfare case Hours: No standard hours Get Directions Visit Website More Details WITH LOVE RESOURCE FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and gently used clothing, shoes, toys, books, and supplies. Delivery is available to those living within 30 minutes of the Tigard facility. Scheduled pick-ups at the Tigard facility are available for others, Monday-Friday. There are textured hair care classes for transracial resource parents. 14555 SW 74th Avenue Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Resource parents with children in foster care ages 0-6 (up until 7th birthday) and after the child's case has changed to permanency Hours: By appointment Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH OF PRINEVILLE HOPE'S CLOSET PROJECT 48 PROJECT 48 PROJECT LEMONADE PROJECT LEMONADE SWEET POTATO'S CLOSET SWEET POTATO'S CLOSET THE CONTINGENT MY NEIGHBOR WITH LOVE RESOURCE FAMILY SUPPORT
